title: MEDICAL RIDES - 211info
text: NORTHWEST CHRISTIAN CHURCH NEWBERG CAMPUS MEDICAL RIDES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation to medical appointments. ADA vehicles are available. 2315 Villa Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Varies Email (503) 538-3104 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 538-3104 Debbie Groat [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dundee, McMinnville, Newberg, and Tigard TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Guests should park in the lot on the north side of the church. Meals are distributed in front of the door marked "Community Kitchen". Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - NEWBERG COMMUNITY KITCHEN AND FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
